refine Memℓp.of_support_finite ?_ (by norm_num)
  have : Function.support GEO ⊆ {1} := by
    intro n
    simp only [GEO, Nat.cast_eq_zero, Function.mem_support, ne_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    intro h
    match n with
    | 0 => contradiction
    | 1 => rfl
    | n+2 => rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.succ_pos _))] at h; contradiction
  exact Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_singleton 1) this

apply Memℓp.of_finite_support
  have : {n | GEO n ≠ 0} ⊆ {1} := by
    intro n
    simp [GEO]
    intro h
    have := Nat.le_of_div_ne_zero h
    rcases n with (_ | _ | n)
    · simp at h
    · rfl
    · contradiction
  exact (finite_singleton 1).subset this
